sessionName: Hypertrophy B — full circuit (5K TT moved to Sun)
intro: LOGGED — fed, no issues anywhere, elbow clean 3rd straight (Adj #163). Calf ran to the cap: headroom restored, 355 bump-eligible next Sat AM-gated (Adj #160); row bump-eligible 80 (Adj #156). Tomorrow: 5K TT — pre-TT AM Achilles read is the last gate (Adj #146).

table.cue: Bump lands on a clean set 3 (RIR 1) holding the 8-rep floor (Adj #133)
Hold — rebuild needs sets 1-2 both RIR 1+ (Adj #134)
Bump per Adj #137; stay inside the 12-15 band

table.exercise: Preacher curl machine, unilateral (semi-supinated if available)
table.cue: Hold 60 — 65 needs a full clean outing (Adj #139)
Landed Tue at 4×12 (12/12/9/8, elbow clean) — hold-until-clean: set 3 RIR 1+ at 12; any elbow symptom → drop to 22.5 (Adj #151)

table.rir: sets 1-3 ≥1; last set only to failure
table.cue: Zero-headroom hold — TT tomorrow; do NOT run all sets to failure (Adj #135/#146)
First to cut if the session runs past 40 min (§6); Adj #140 re-evaluate

lift.warmup: General: 1–2 min band pull-aparts + scap push-ups. Wrist-extensor isometric 3×30 s/arm (§10.A pre-lift).
lift.cooldown: Tyler twists 3×15 + reverse Tyler 3×15 (4 s eccentric); daily SI prehab. Early night — 5K TT tomorrow AM.

currentLoads.lastVerified: W12 Tue 7/7 (§5 re-test: 145×5 RIR 2 top + AMRAP 130×13 RIR 0)
currentLoads.note: §5 re-test executed — e1RM ~186 → TM 162→168. Three-week 145 hold converts: bump 150 at W13 Tue, Build scheme opens (1×5 @ working + AMRAP @ 80% TM = 135); if 150×5 lands ≤RIR 1 → back to 145 (Adj #148)

Started at 170 by mistake — the 170 opener hit a clean 8 @ RIR 1 (ceiling evidence), then set 2 lost the 8-floor and the intended 165 ran both sets to failure. Hold 165 — bump-eligible 170 on a clean 4×8 with set 3 RIR 1 (Adj #155)
Ladder condition MET — sets 1-2 both RIR 1+, full 3×10 with headroom on every set; first clean outing since the reset. Bump 80 next Sat (Adj #156)
Mid-block tightened, both closers to failure — but the opener softened to RIR 4. Hold 30; don't bump on a soft opener (Adj #127/#149)
35 landed on load, not reps — sets 1-2 in-band with tighter openers, sets 3-4 fell below the 12 floor to failure. Hold 35, rebuild to all-4-in-band (Adj #157)
Cleanest 65 outing — double progression met → bump 70 next Tue; Sat slot unaffected (Adj #150)
Best Sat outing of the cycle — sets 1-3 all at the 12 target with real reserve up front, back half still to failure. Hold 60; the clean-with-reps-to-spare condition stands (Adj #158)
Front half cleaner than Tue (RIR 2/2 vs 1/0), same 12/12/9/8 shape — hold-until-clean (set 3 RIR 1+ at 12) not met. Hold 25 both slots; elbow clean 3rd straight session (Adj #159)
135 landed — set 1 RIR 3 = the prescribed RPE 7 target. Hold (Adj #153)
Headroom RESTORED — ran exactly to the cap (sets 1-3 RIR 1+, last set only to failure at 13). Adj #135 condition met → bump 355 next Sat on a clean lift-day AM Achilles read (Adj #160)

currentLoads.load: BW+10 lb at BOTH slots (hold, rebuild) — Tue to 3×12, Sat to 3×10
currentLoads.note: Sat +10 debut rougher than Tue's — set 1 zero reserve, sets 2-3 fell 8/5, all to failure. Hold +10 both slots, rebuild to slot rep targets with set 3 RIR 1-2; no revert to BW (Adj #152/#161)
Re-read confounded — ran out of time, both sets back-to-back with no rest. Hold 130; re-evaluate on a rested outing (Adj #162)
